instruction: This currency dollar icon needs a blue header bar added back along the top (rect x=16, y=12, 96x6, fill #3b82f6).
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/currency-dollar.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M12 6v12m-3-2.818.879.659c1.171.879 3.07.879 4.242 0 1.172-.879 1.172-2.303 0-3.182C13.536 12.219 12.768 12 12 12c-.725 0-1.45-.22-2.003-.659-1.106-.879-1.106-2.303 0-3.182s2.9-.879 4.006 0l.415.33M21 12a9 9 0 1 1-18 0 9 9 0 0 1 18 0Z"/></g>
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/currency-dollar.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M12 6v12m-3-2.818.879.659c1.171.879 3.07.879 4.242 0 1.172-.879 1.172-2.303 0-3.182C13.536 12.219 12.768 12 12 12c-.725 0-1.45-.22-2.003-.659-1.106-.879-1.106-2.303 0-3.182s2.9-.879 4.006 0l.415.33M21 12a9 9 0 1 1-18 0 9 9 0 0 1 18 0Z"/></g>
  <rect id="bar" fill="#3b82f6" x="16" y="12" width="96" height="6" />
</svg>
